# Application Performance Monitoring Synthetics

Manage OCI Application Performance Monitoring synthetics scripts from Kubernetes with a reviewed controller-backed runtime.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `apmsynthetics` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-apmsynthetics-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-apmsynthetics:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-apmsynthetics-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to Script while monitors, vantage points, workers, and helper families stay unpublished.
- The published runtime uses synchronous read-after-write follow-up semantics, scopes reuse by exact `displayName` plus `contentType` within one `apmDomainId`, and mirrors `apmDomainId` into status because OCI does not echo it in response bodies.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
